description: React functional component 'Sidebar' that provides a UI for searching notes and filtering by tags. It uses application context to manage filters and tags, includes local state for search input, and handles toggle actions for tags.

methods.name: toggleTag
methods.description: Handles toggling the selection state of a tag by its ID, updating the filters accordingly.

methods.name: handleSearchInput
methods.description: Updates search term state and filters in context when the search input value changes.
